text.tspan: lunedì 13 luglio 2026 alle ore 23:17 Ora legale dell’Europa centrale

All three JVMs stop and discard process memory, then restart from their original non-empty roots. Each node recovers its stable UUID, Ratis state, immutable replicas, and committed bucket/object-reference generations. Reordered seeds do not rewrite persisted membership. An exact-byte GET proceeds through B after recovery; rolling upgrades and membership changes are outside this runtime flow.
